scope.summary: Adds profile-owned session_release_statements and logoff_statements, validates and redacts them, executes release hooks before clean pooled idle reuse, and executes logoff hooks before thin logical close.
out_of_scope: B7b live AFTER LOGOFF verification for clean exit and SIGTERM on pinned and pooled sessions

entry_points.name: profile config to OracleConnectOptions
entry_points.trace: oraclemcp-core connect tests validate hook propagation, trimming, empty-entry rejection, and Debug redaction

entry_points.name: RustOracleConnection::close
entry_points.trace: oraclemcp-db session tests validate teardown hook error redaction; close path executes logoff hooks before consuming logical close

entry_points.name: OraclePool successful check-in
entry_points.trace: oraclemcp-db pool tests validate dirty discard invariants; implementation only runs release hooks after successful call and successful limit restore, and hook failure discards instead of idling

entry_points.name: cargo fmt --all -- --check
entry_points.trace: Passed after the B7a hook implementation.

entry_points.name: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo check -p oraclemcp-db
entry_points.trace: Passed after the B7a DB hook implementation.

entry_points.name: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo check -p oraclemcp-config
entry_points.trace: Passed after the B7a profile schema changes.

entry_points.name: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo check -p oraclemcp-core
entry_points.trace: Passed after the B7a profile propagation changes.

entry_points.name: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-config --test discovery_writer_parity
entry_points.trace: Passed 5 config discovery writer parity tests.

entry_points.name: git diff --check -- <B7a scoped paths>
entry_points.trace: Passed whitespace check for the B7a scoped diff.

limitations: No live AFTER LOGOFF trigger proof is claimed here; B7b is the queued verification bead for clean exit and SIGTERM across pinned and pooled sessions.
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo check -p oraclemcp was attempted but blocked by an unrelated dirty main.rs doctor initializer missing iam_token_source from another agent's in-flight work.
